name: Sweet and Sour Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
20 oz Canned chunk pineapple (in heavy syrup)
1 medium Green bell pepper (cut into 1/2-inch strips)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ground beef, oats, egg, 1/4 cup catsup, onion, garlic powder, and ginger in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Shape the mixture to form about thirty 1-inch meatballs.
3. In a medium skillet, cook meatballs over medium heat until evenly brown, about 15 minutes. Remove from skillet; drain excess fat.
4. Drain pineapple, reserving syrup. Add brown sugar and cornstarch to the skillet. Stir in reserved pineapple syrup, vinegar, remaining 1/4 cup catsup, and soy sauce. Bring mixture to a boil, stirring until thickened.
5. Add meatballs, pineapple, and green pepper; reduce heat. Cover and simmer for about 10 minutes or until the green pepper is crisp-tender, stirring occasionally.
6. Serve over cooked rice if desired.
MICROWAVE DIRECTIONS:
1. Prepare the meat mixture as directed above and shape into meatballs.
2. Place meatballs and green pepper strips in an 11x7-inch microwaveable baking dish. Cover with wax paper.
3. Microwave at HIGH for 8 to 10 minutes or until the green pepper is crisp-tender, turning meatballs after 4 minutes.
4. Drain pineapple, reserving syrup. Combine brown sugar and cornstarch in the baking dish. Stir in reserved pineapple syrup, vinegar, remaining 1/4 cup catsup, and soy sauce. Microwave at HIGH for 5 to 6 minutes or until thickened, stirring after each 2 minutes.
5. Add reserved meatballs, green pepper, and pineapple; microwave at HIGH for 1 to 2 minutes or until heated through.
6. Serve over cooked rice if desired.
